Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN C. JOHNSON, ESQ. of The Chanler Group, Tel No. 510-848-8880 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ELIZABETH V. MCNULTY of Archer Norris, Tel No. 949-975-8200 appearing telephonically for Defendant School Specialty, Inc.

Matter not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
